notes: Seed examples curated for concise topic extraction and one-liner generation.

input.transcript:
gemhunter: Happy new month and stay safe in hot zones.
Will: Why is there no update yet?
gemhunter: Daily summary appears after the day is complete.
Will: Storage timing still feels unclear versus roadmap.
chris: Storage is planned, but TEE-first milestones are ahead of it.

topics.title: Daily summary timing clarified
topics.content: Members clarified that daily reports are generated after the day fully completes.

topics.title: Persistent storage versus launch sequencing
topics.content: Participants discussed storage timing, while the team reiterated TEE-first milestones before storage rollout.

expectedOutput.oneliner: New-month check-ins shifted into product talk on summary timing and storage priorities.

input.transcript:
chris: Group summaries can run now without long-term storage.
Will: Please clarify anonymity-set mechanics and docs.
chris: Actions execute in PER, then final state settles to Solana.
Will: Is shielding tied to one wallet right now?
Hexx: Multi-wallet support is needed before broader launch.

topics.title: PER model and documentation clarity
topics.content: The team explained PER execution and Solana settlement while members requested clearer documentation on privacy mechanics.

topics.title: Launch readiness and wallet UX limits
topics.content: Members raised launch questions around shielding behavior and multi-wallet support, and current constraints were clarified.

expectedOutput.oneliner: Roadmap day at Loyal: PER mechanics, storage sequencing, and wallet UX questions before launch.
